mapper.select: select a.id, a.admin_no, a.name, a.gender, a.role, a.college_id, c.college_name, a.phone, a.email, a.account_status, a.password, a.create_time, a.update_time from admin a left join college c on a.college_id = c.id where a.admin_no = #{adminNo} and a.account_status = '启用'

select a.id, a.admin_no, a.name, a.gender, a.role, a.college_id, c.college_name, a.phone, a.email, a.account_status, a.create_time, a.update_time from admin a left join college c on a.college_id = c.id where a.id = #{id}

select a.id, a.admin_no, a.name, a.gender, a.role, c.college_name, a.account_status, a.create_time from admin a left join college c on a.college_id = c.id
and a.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%') and a.role = #{role} and a.admin_no like concat('%', #{adminNo}, '%')
order by a.id desc

select a.id, a.admin_no, a.name, a.gender, a.role, a.college_id, c.college_name, a.phone, a.email, a.account_status, a.create_time, a.update_time from admin a left join college c on a.college_id = c.id where a.college_id = #{collegeId} and a.account_status = '启用' order by case a.role when '超级管理员' then 0 else 1 end, a.id asc limit 1
